description: CompositionBrown V-neck top made of cotton, with short puffed sleeves and ribbed hems, heavily sequenced along the neck line and mildly pleated at the bustFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironFlaunt your girly attitude in style with this brown top from jealous 21. The heavy sequence work along the neckline is sure to catch the attention of anyone aroudn you, while the soft, subtle shade of brown tones down the sequence work, adding a glam touch to it. The slightly puffed sleeves with ribbed hems Fit snugly around your rounded arms, creating a complete feminine look. Team this with jeans, shorts or skirts and high-heeled sandals from the wide range at myntra for that girly look.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
